goal: Responsive root layout and global overlays
summary: Phase 1 complete. Root layout expanded: App.tsx uses max-w-lg md:max-w-7xl with md:pl-60 sidebar padding. Dialogs/sheets widened with responsive breakpoints. LiveHostPage setup overlay expanded. All 3 steps verified via build, tsc, and lint — no regressions.
stepSummaries:
1. Update App.tsx container: replace max-w-lg with max-w-lg md:max-w-7xl and fix sidebar padding from lg:pl-60 to md:pl-60. [verified]
  2. Update dialog.tsx, alert-dialog.tsx, and sheet.tsx with responsive max-width classes (md:max-w-xl lg:max-w-2xl). [verified]
  3. Update LiveHostPage setup overlay max-w-[320px] to max-w-[320px] md:max-w-md lg:max-w-lg. [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1 verified via grep showing md:max-w-7xl and md:pl-60 in App.tsx; build passed, tsc clean. Step 2 verified via grep showing md:max-w-xl lg:max-w-2xl in dialog/alert-dialog and md:max-w-md lg:max-w-lg in sheet; build passed. Step 3 verified via grep showing max-w-[320px] md:max-w-md lg:max-w-lg in LiveHostPage; build passed.
gateVerdicts.rationale: Every step was verified through build (syntactic) and grep (proxy). The actual responsive layout behavior requires visual inspection in a browser, which is unavailable. This is acceptable for CSS class changes, but we acknowledge the verification chain is syntactic/proxy.

gateVerdicts.evidence: App.tsx now has max-w-lg md:max-w-7xl and md:pl-60. Dialogs and sheets have responsive max-width classes. LiveHostPage setup overlay has responsive max-width. All present in the diff.
gateVerdicts.rationale: The phase goal — responsive root layout and global overlays — is met. The root container expands, sidebar padding starts at the correct breakpoint, dialogs/sheets widen on desktop, and the live setup overlay scales.

gateVerdicts.evidence: All 3 planned steps were completed with verification: App.tsx container, dialog/sheet/alert-dialog widths, LiveHostPage setup overlay width. No deferred items.
gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing was deferred. The foundation work for Phase 2 is ready: root container and overlay components provide the responsive base that Phase 2 pages will inhabit.
